title: Dragonsteel & Star Alloy [Magical Metallurgy Series]
description: Craft powerful tools and weapons with the mighty Dragonsteel and the magical star alloy!
body:
# 📦 Installation
### Required
Dragon Scale
### Strongly recommended
Roughly Enough Items - to see the added recipes!

# ✨ Features
This mod adds a new ingot made of the mighty Dragonsteel and magical Star Alloy! Two new material types 2-3 times stronger than netherite usable to craft the most powerful tools you will ever see!

![Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d3efeb9e7a8a325ca9c351748eeef2169914e27.png)
